label: Anthropic Official Skills
commits: b0cbd3d skill-creator: drop ANTHROPIC_API_KEY requirement from description optimizer
diffContent:
diff --git a/skills/claude-api/SKILL.md b/skills/claude-api/SKILL.md
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/skills/claude-api/SKILL.md
@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+---
+name: claude-api
+description: Build apps with the Claude API using the Anthropic SDK
+---
+
+# Claude API Skill
+
+## Models
+- claude-opus-4-6 (latest, most capable)
+- claude-sonnet-4-6 (balanced)
+- claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (fast, cheap)
+
+## Key patterns
+- Use extended thinking for complex reasoning
+- Prefer tool_use over raw JSON extraction
+- Use response streaming for long outputs

+++ b/RELEASE-NOTES.md
@@ -1,3 +1,15 @@
+## v5.0.5 (2026-03-20)
+- Fix: brainstorm server ESM/CommonJS module conflict
+- Fix: Windows PID handling for brainstorm server lifecycle
+- Breaking: brainstorming skill now requires Node.js 20+
+
+## v5.0.0 (2026-03-10)
+- Breaking: skill format v2 — frontmatter now requires 'allowed-tools' field
+- Breaking: removed deprecated ~/.codex/ skill path support
+- New: native Cursor plugin support
+- New: skill triggering test harness
